data.content:
legal framework,licensing	Finance Law
State Budget
The state budget is licensed under the finance law.

financial composition,revenue source	State Resources
Tax Revenues
Tax revenues are a primary source of state resources.

composition,financial planning	State Budget
State Expenditures
State expenditures are a component of the state budget.

composition,financial planning	State Budget
State Resources
State resources are a component of the state budget.

allocation,financial management	Budget Credits
State Budget
Budget credits are allocated within the state budget for programs or tasks.

allocation,financial management	Budget Credits
Programs
Budget credits can be allocated for programs.

allocation,financial management	Budget Credits
Tasks
Budget credits can be allocated for tasks.
